description: The Double To Float Copy component copies a double field to a float field, while casting it down to the lower precision values of a float. this is useful for copying between these slightly incompatible types (not fully incompatible though as seen in flux).

fields.Source: The source Double field to copy from.
fields.Target: The field to drive with the value of a Float representation of ``Source``
fields.WriteBack: Whether changes to ``Target`` get written back to ``Source``
